title: Inside the Whale Tree
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on inside the whale tree within the Inside the Whale Tree storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: The Ninja is the life of the party!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NIN-NIN! NIN-NIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: enough with the "Nin-Nin" crap al- ready! »

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: You just so happened to witness my NinjaU by coincidence!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Coincidence, Hmm~? Even though you were totally showing it off to us"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you guys crying?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not in the slightest!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Men of the Wano Kingdom shalt never shed a tear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In the past, when I first journeyed to this land...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was nothing like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The sprawling Cities... the flowing rivers ...they were so beautiful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The towns ...they were bustling with people living their daily lives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was as if the country itself was alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: These foolish minks... they acted far too rashly...!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Mark mine words; in order to begin to repay this insur- mountable debt, I shall work tirelessly! So, I beg of thee...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Forgive me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Forgive me, my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ooooi! Little Rascals!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Looks like the deciphering of the "stone" is complete!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come! to the inside of the whale!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How does it look, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is what was inscribed on the pone- glyph?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It certainly appears as if a sea chart was drawn here at some point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It seems that it may be pointing to a specific location, Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Whale Forest is revered as a sacred place because of the existence of this very stone!

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: We "guardians" are tasked with the crucial role of protecting it!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: That red slab over there is commonly known as the "road poneglyph"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The final point of the Grand Line, which has been endlessly sought by the stalwart Warriors of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This stone is a guide to that very location!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can't possibly mean...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The final island... Raffle!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Exactly right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: EEH?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How- Ever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's the freakin' finish line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You'll be freakin' pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HUUUUUUUUUHHA?! The location of Rafiel is seriously written on that big slab o'rock?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait, wait! Hold your horses! There's a "however"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "How- Ever"! Y'Hear?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The Red Stone: "Road PoneGlyph"... It's not the only one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There are a total of four throughout the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuhhh?! There's four rafts?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hell no! Were you even listening?! Let the man finish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Indeed, on that stone, the path to a specific location is inscribed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But that location is not rafflel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And the same goes for the three remaining stones as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: On each stone, a different point is inscribed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Once all those locations are known...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Each point can then be marked on a map! And at the point where they converge and intersect...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The destination you seek will emerge...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The legendary "Final Island" which, save for the pirate King and his crew,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: None have ever laid eyes on for hundreds of years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Will finally be revealed... Raftel!

summary: Inside the Whale Tree: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
